creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
cited from your log:
-I/usr/PortsWRKDIR/usr/ports/security/libfido2/work/libfido2-1.15.0/src -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L

cited from [1]:
-I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/security/libfido2/work/libfido2-1.15.0/src -I/usr/local/include -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L

Since I cannot reproduce this issue, you can only find the reason by yourself.
Please figure out why "-I/usr/local/include" is missing on your box.
I'd like to close this PR now.

[1] https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/package19/data/140amd64-default-build-as-user/39a5c2d0b3e6/logs/libfido2-1.15.0.log
